beginner.title: Calculator Application
beginner.description: A simple console-based calculator that performs basic arithmetic operations.
requirements: Implement addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division
Handle user input for numbers and operations
features: Error handling for division by zero
steps: Set up the main class structure

requirements: Search for students by ID or name

intermediate.description: Manage library operations including book lending, returns, and member management.
